company_context: Identity solutions for a trusted digital world - Signicat Skip to main content Menu Fight fraud with digital identity Onboard customers, sign agreements, manage user logins and automate identity workflows – all while fighting fraud and staying compliant across multiple markets. Contact Sales Create a free account Over 21,000 companies globally trust Signicat’s digital identity solutions. Read Signicat customer stories Signicat products The world's most extensive identity platform – one access point Meet local requirements today and scale for tomorrow’s cross-border growth with an identity platform that covers the entire customer lifecycle. From compliant onboarding and secure login to electronic signing and orchestration – we've got you covered. Discover Signicat products Identity Proofing Verify identities of people and organisations Open the floodgates for the right customers (and keep the fraudsters out) by doing identity checks automatically, in real-time, as part of KYC/KYB and AML-compliant digital onboarding. eID and Wallet Hub ID Document and Biometric Verification ReuseID Data Verification Get started with Identity Proofing Authentication Log in users securely and manage access rights An easy, secure login is the key to a smooth customer journey. Electronic Signature API Dokobit Portal by Signicat Digital Evidence Management Get started with Electronic Signing Trust Orchestration Automate and optimise compliant identity and risk workflows Orchestrate, build, visualise and automate business flows for risk management, KYC/KYB and AML-compliant onboarding, secure authentication and electronic signing. conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm a Sales Development Representative at DeepData AI. We're a leading provider of data processing solutions, and I came across Signicat while researching companies in the identity solutions space. I noticed that you're using a combination of onboarding, signing, and authentication tools, and I think our solution could help optimize your data workflows.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yes, we're Signicat. We've got a pretty robust setup in place, so I'm not sure what kind of solution you're offering that would be relevant to us. What makes DeepData AI different from other data processing tools out there?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's a great question. Our AI-powered engine can process large volumes of data in real-time, providing actionable insights that can help streamline your identity verification and authentication processes. We've seen significant ROI for our clients in the fintech and banking spaces. I'd love to schedule a demo to show you how it works.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but I'm not sure we're in the market for a new data processing solution right now. We've got a lot of existing integrations in place, and I'm concerned about the potential disruption to our workflows. Can you tell me more about how your solution would integrate with our current systems?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely. Our solution is designed to be highly adaptable, and we've got a robust API framework that allows for seamless integration with a wide range of systems. We've also got a dedicated support team to ensure a smooth onboarding process. In terms of cost, we offer a tiered pricing structure that can be customized to fit your specific needs.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I see. Well, I think we'd need to take a closer look at the pricing and ensure that it aligns with our budget. We're also in the midst of evaluating other solutions from competitors, so I'm not sure where DeepData AI would fit in our priority list. Can you send over some more information, and I'll review it with our team?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Of course, I'd be happy to send over some additional resources. However, I want to emphasize that our solution is highly scalable and can provide significant benefits in terms of efficiency and cost savings. I'd love to schedule a follow-up call to discuss further and answer any questions you may have.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate your enthusiasm, Alex, but I think we're going to have to pass on DeepData AI for now. We've got a lot on our plate, and I don't see this as a priority for our team at this time. Thank you for reaching out, and I wish you the best of luck with your sales efforts.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Integration
Feedback: The seller should have provided more specific examples or case studies to alleviate the buyer's concerns about integration and disruption to their existing workflows. Sentiment: Neutral
